Metadata.title: REZNO
Metadata.description: Manage bookings and grow your business with REZNO.

BusinessManagement.title: Business profile
BusinessManagement.description: Update your business identity and customer-facing contact information.
BusinessManagement.generalDescription: The primary details for your business.
BusinessManagement.contactDescription: Help customers contact your business and find it online.
BusinessManagement.visualDescription: Add clear image links to give your public page a professional identity.

BusinessManagement.slugHelp: Choose a unique English name for your public URL: rezno.net/{slug}

Services.title: Services
Services.description: Create the services customers can book at your locations.
Services.emptyDescription: Create your first service to begin accepting bookings.
Services.imageUrlHelp: Use a direct image URL until file uploads are enabled.
Services.assignedEmployeesHelp: Optional mode assigns an available employee automatically. Required mode lets the customer choose from selected employees; one selected employee becomes fixed.
Services.noEmployees: Add team members first if this service needs a provider.

availability.title: Service availability
availability.branchBased: This service uses branch working hours and the availability of its selected providers.

HOURS.description: This service cannot receive bookings until the location's working hours are configured.
HOURS.selectionWarning: This location has no working hours, so customers will not see service times.

STAFF.description: Staff selection is required, but no assigned staff member has availability at this location.

Bookings.customerDescription: Track upcoming appointments and your booking history.
Bookings.businessDescription: Review customer bookings and update their status.
Bookings.calendarDescription: Your booking schedule for the next 30 days.
Bookings.newDescription: Choose a service and date, then reserve a suitable time.
Bookings.chooseServiceDescription: Only services currently available online are shown.
Bookings.serviceDefaultDescription: A bookable service from this business.

employee.label: Choose an employee
employee.optionalHelp: Choose a specific employee or let the business assign any available employee.
employee.requiredHelp: Choose an available employee to continue.
employee.availableHint: Available times will update for this staff member.
employee.chooseDescription: Select your preferred employee to see their available times.

Bookings.rescheduleDescription: Choose a new time for {service} at {branch}.
Bookings.rescheduleNotAllowedDescription: The change window has passed or the booking status does not allow changes.

rescheduleErrors.invalid: Check the selected time and try again.
rescheduleErrors.unavailable: That time is no longer available. Choose another one.
rescheduleErrors.notAllowed: The booking change window no longer allows rescheduling.

changeRequest.title: Propose a new time
changeRequest.description: Choose a new time for {customer}'s {service} booking. It will not change before customer approval.
changeRequest.customerTitle: A new time was proposed for your booking

Bookings.emptyDescription: Your booking details will appear here after your first appointment.
Bookings.businessEmptyDescription: Customer bookings will appear here when they arrive.
Bookings.noTimesDescription: Try another date or choose a different service.

slotReasons.SERVICE_NOT_ASSIGNED: This service is not assigned to a location available for booking.
slotReasons.SERVICE_INACTIVE: This service is inactive or currently unavailable to book.
slotReasons.OFFERING_UNAVAILABLE: This service is no longer available to book.
slotReasons.HOURS_NOT_CONFIGURED: The business has not configured working hours for this location yet.
slotReasons.CLOSED_ON_DATE: This location is closed on that day. Try another date.
slotReasons.STAFF_NOT_CONFIGURED: This service requires staff, but team availability has not been configured.
slotReasons.STAFF_UNAVAILABLE: No staff member is available that day. Try another date.
slotReasons.NO_SLOTS: There are no open times that day. Try another date.

Bookings.noServicesDescription: No services are currently published for booking.

errors.invalid: The booking details are invalid. Try again.
errors.unavailable: That time is no longer available. Choose another time.
errors.rateLimited: Too many booking attempts in a short time. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.failed: Could not create the booking right now. Please try again shortly.

Landing.title: Your next service is closer than you think
Landing.description: Discover nearby businesses and services, compare available times, and book in minutes from one place.

searchFeature.title: Simple discovery
searchFeature.description: Search by service or city and find the right option.

bookingFeature.title: Real availability
bookingFeature.description: Choose an available time and receive instant confirmation.

manageFeature.title: Reliable management
manageFeature.description: Customer and business bookings stay organized in one place.

Landing.featuredDescription: Available services from businesses published on REZNO.
Landing.featuredEmpty: Published businesses will appear here soon.
Landing.trendingServicesDescription: Explore services currently available from businesses on REZNO.
Landing.servicesEmpty: No services are currently available to book.

Marketplace.title: Service marketplace
Marketplace.description: Find businesses and services available to book through REZNO.
Marketplace.emptyDescription: Try a shorter search or change the category or city.
Marketplace.defaultDescription: Services and appointments available to book.

RESTAURANT.title: Restaurants
RESTAURANT.description: Reserve a table and browse menus.

BusinessPublic.defaultDescription: Browse available services and book a suitable time.

actions.qrDescription: Scan the code to open this business page.

BusinessPublic.noContact: No public contact information is currently available.
BusinessPublic.reservationComingSoon: Table reservation checkout will be enabled in the next phase. You can view the menu and contact the business now.
BusinessPublic.reserveTableDescription: Choose a time, guest count, and table. You can optionally add menu items before arrival.

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.emptyDescription: New booking updates will appear here.
Notifications.changeRequest: A new time was proposed for {service}. Review and accept or reject it.
Notifications.reviewRequest: How was your {service} experience? Leave a review.

DashboardHome.businessDescription: A quick view of your business and upcoming schedule.
DashboardHome.customerDescription: Manage your appointments and discover your next visit.

hours.title: Complete your working hours so customers can see appointments
hours.description: Review each location's hours so REZNO can show accurate availability.

images.title: Add clear images to your services
images.description: A good image explains your service quickly and builds confidence before booking.

calendar.title: Stay on top of your day from the booking calendar
calendar.description: Review upcoming appointments and their statuses in one place.

DashboardHome.businessEmptyDescription: New customer bookings will appear here.
DashboardHome.customerEmptyDescription: Choose a service and book your first appointment.

discovery.placesDescription: Suggestions from businesses published on REZNO. Location-based ranking is not used yet.
discovery.servicesDescription: Services currently available to book from different businesses.
discovery.emptyDescription: Published businesses and services will appear here.
discovery.categoriesDescription: Start quickly with restaurants, cafes, salons, clinics, and more.

commandCenter.title: Today at a glance
commandCenter.description: The most important booking signals and actions in one place.

BusinessSetup.title: Business setup progress
BusinessSetup.score: {score}% of your public profile is complete
BusinessSetup.missingDescription: Complete these items so customers can confidently discover and book your business.
BusinessSetup.readyTitle: Your business is ready to receive bookings.
BusinessSetup.readyDescription: Keep your calendar, services, and profile up to date as bookings arrive.

ready.label: Ready for bookings
ready.description: Customers can discover your business and book available services.

almost.label: Almost ready
almost.description: Your setup is close. Fix the remaining items before promoting your page.

notReady.label: Not ready
notReady.description: Customers may not be able to book yet. Complete the missing setup items first.

explanations.businessInfo: Customers need a category, description, and phone number before they trust the listing.
explanations.coverImage: A cover image makes the public page feel complete and professional.
explanations.logo: A logo helps customers recognize your business across REZNO.
explanations.branch: Bookings need at least one active location.
explanations.hours: REZNO cannot generate bookable times until working hours are configured.
explanations.service: Customers need at least one active service to book.
explanations.employee: One or more services require a staff member, so add a team member first.
explanations.published: Hidden profiles are not discoverable by customers.
explanations.table: Restaurants and cafes need active tables before the upcoming reservation experience is enabled.
explanations.menuItem: Add at least one available menu item so customers can see the menu.
explanations.menuCategory: Organize the menu into sections like drinks or main dishes so customers can browse it easily.

CommandPalette.description: Search for a page or action and open it instantly.

Onboarding.title: Get started
Onboarding.description: Choose how to start. The same account works for bookings and business management.
Onboarding.customerDescription: Discover businesses, manage appointments, and keep your booking history in one place.
Onboarding.businessDescription: Create your business workspace and first location. You will be the owner.
Onboarding.businessSlugHelp: Choose a unique English name with at least 5 characters.
Onboarding.slugInvalid: Use lowercase English letters, numbers, and hyphens only, with at least 5 characters.
Onboarding.slugTaken: This URL is already in use. Choose another.
Onboarding.slugReserved: This URL is reserved by the platform. Choose another.
Onboarding.businessNameMin: Business name must be at least 2 characters.
Onboarding.businessNameMax: Business name must be 120 characters or fewer.
Onboarding.branchNameMin: Location name must be at least 2 characters.
Onboarding.branchNameMax: Location name must be 120 characters or fewer.
Onboarding.invalid: Check the highlighted fields and try again.
Onboarding.failure: We couldn't create your business. Try again.

businessType.title: Business type
businessType.description: Choose your business type so REZNO can prepare the right dashboard and readiness flow.

BEAUTY.description: Best for services, appointments, and staff.

SPA.description: Best for services, appointments, and staff.

CONSULTANT.label: Consultant
CONSULTANT.description: Best for consultations and appointments without requiring a large team.

OTHER.label: Other

Profile.title: Profile
Profile.description: Keep your personal details accurate and up to date.
Profile.personalDescription: These details are used for your REZNO account and bookings.
Profile.emptyTitle: Sign in to manage your profile
Profile.emptyDescription: Your profile is connected to your REZNO account.
Profile.displayNameHelp: This is the name other people will see across REZNO.

messages.invalid: Check the highlighted fields and try again.
messages.failure: We couldn't save your profile. Try again.

validation.firstNameMin: First name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.firstNameMax: First name must be 50 characters or fewer.
validation.optionalTextMax: This field must be 100 characters or fewer.
validation.phoneMax: Phone number must be 30 characters or fewer.

Profile.avatarUrlHelp: Enter an optional image URL. If empty, initials are used.

Errors.title: Something went wrong
Errors.description: We couldn't load this page. Try again and contact support if the problem continues.
Errors.publicDescription: We couldn't load the content. Check your connection and try again.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: The page may have moved or the link may be incorrect.

Validation.businessNameMin: Business name must be at least 2 characters.
Validation.businessNameMax: Business name must be 120 characters or fewer.
Validation.legalNameMax: Legal name must be 160 characters or fewer.
Validation.descriptionMax: Description must be 2,000 characters or fewer.
Validation.urlInvalid: Enter a valid URL beginning with http:// or https://.
Validation.slugInvalid: Use 5–80 lowercase English letters or numbers, separated by hyphens if needed.
Validation.branchNameMin: Location name must be at least 2 characters.
Validation.branchNameMax: Location name must be 120 characters or fewer.
Validation.addressMax: This field must be 160 characters or fewer.
Validation.serviceNameMin: Service name must be at least 2 characters.
Validation.serviceNameMax: Service name must be 120 characters or fewer.
Validation.priceInvalid: Enter a valid price greater than zero.
Validation.durationInvalid: Duration must be between 5 and 1,440 minutes.
Validation.cancellationWindowInvalid: Cancellation window must be between 0 and 720 hours.
Validation.staffRequired: Select at least one employee for this service.
Validation.timeRangeInvalid: Closing time must be later than opening time.
Validation.dateTimeInvalid: Enter a valid date and time.

Admin.accessDenied: Your account does not have access to the admin panel.
Admin.notConfiguredDescription: The admin panel is protected, but administrator accounts must be configured before it can be used.
Admin.adminAccessDescription: Grant limited platform admin access with fixed permissions while keeping REZNO_ADMIN_EMAILS as the root Super Admin bootstrap.
Admin.rootSuperAdminHelp: These accounts come from REZNO_ADMIN_EMAILS and cannot be locked out from this screen.
Admin.noUserFoundWithEmail: No user found with this email.
Admin.cannotEditOwnAdminAccess: You cannot edit your own admin access.

Messages.tooQuickly: You are sending messages too quickly

RestaurantReservations.title: Reserve a table at {business}
RestaurantReservations.description: Choose the date, time, and guest count, then select a table and optional menu items.

empty.NO_BRANCH: This business has no active branch yet.
empty.NO_HOURS: No working hours are configured for this day. Choose another day or contact the business.
empty.NO_TABLES: No suitable tables are available for this guest count.
empty.NO_SLOTS: No times are available on this day. Try another date or guest count.
empty.NO_BRANCH_SELECTED: Select a branch first to view available times and tables.

errors.invalid: Reservation details could not be read. Try again.
errors.table: The selected table is not available for this reservation.
errors.table-unavailable: This table was just reserved. Choose another table or time.
errors.time: The selected time is outside working hours or during a special closure.
errors.rateLimited: Too many reservation attempts in a short time. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.failed: Could not confirm the table reservation right now. Please try again shortly.

RestaurantReservations.menuOptional: Leave quantities at zero to reserve without a pre-order.
